description_long: This is a modern, cubic house with a flat roof and a mix of white, black, and terracotta-colored exterior walls. The structure features large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house includes multiple outdoor spaces, such as a balcony and a ground-level patio with outdoor furniture. Surrounding the house are several trees and a driveway with a parked car, indicating a suburban or urban residential setting. The main entrance is accentuated by a tall glass door and a paved walkway. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, cubic house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, black, and terracotta exterior walls, surrounded by trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: The rear and side of the house are visible, showing a black exterior wall, a rooftop terrace, and several trees nearby.
description_view_1: The front and left side are shown, highlighting the terracotta and white facade, large windows, and a spacious patio with outdoor seating.
description_view_2: The right side is visible, featuring the driveway with a parked car, more windows, and a clear view of the flat roof and balcony.
description_view_3: The main entrance is prominent, with a tall glass door, black facade, driveway, and surrounding trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Tall glass main door with a paved walkway, no porch, and minimalistic modern styling
